description: Legal document concerning state affairs. Dating: 419 AH = 1028–29 CE. Involving the amīr Dhakhīrat al-Dawla, the chief judge (qāḍi l-quḍāt), the Diwan of Zakāt, agricultural produce, and a specified schedule of payments. Related to ONB A. Ch. 28032 (https://www.apd.gwi.uni-muenchen.de/apd/show2.jsp?papname=Khoury_Chrest_I_250&line=1). (Information from the edition in progress by Lorenzo Bondioli and Alan Elbaum.)
description_he: מסמך משפטי בערבית מהמאה ה-11. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
